org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode.creation

Class PolylineDecorationCreationMode

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.actionmode.ActionMode<Figure,SwingViewGraphics2D,Color>
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode.creation.AbstractPolypointDecorationCreationMode
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode.creation.PolylineDecorationCreationMode

  • public class PolylineDecorationCreationMode
extends AbstractPolypointDecorationCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create polylines.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:09
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-swingpanel

    • Constructor Detail

      • PolylineDecorationCreationMode

        public PolylineDecorationCreationMode(boolean persistent,
                              ActionModeManager<Figure,SwingViewGraphics2D,Color> modeManager)
        Construct a new PolylineDecorationCreationMode with the given parent.
        Parameters:
        persistent - indicates if the mode is persistent or not.
        modeManager - a reference to the ModeManager that contains this Mode.

      • PolylineDecorationCreationMode

        public PolylineDecorationCreationMode(boolean persistent)
        Construct a new PolylineDecorationCreationMode. The ActionModeManager should be set before using this object.
        Parameters:
        persistent - indicates if the mode is persistent or not.

      • createFigure

        protected DecorationFigure createFigure(Path2f path)
        Invoked to create a new figure.
        Specified by:
        createFigure in class AbstractPolypointDecorationCreationMode
        Parameters:
        path - is the path to follow.
        Returns:
        the new figure.

      • paintShape

        protected void paintShape(SwingViewGraphics2D g,
              Path2f path,
              Point2D candidate,
              Color borderColor,
              Color backgroundColor)
        Paint the shape that will be created.
        Specified by:
        paintShape in class AbstractPolypointDecorationCreationMode
        path - is the current built path
        candidate - is the next point that may be added in the path.

      • paintShape

        protected void paintShape(SwingViewGraphics2D g,
              Point2D lastPoint,
              Point2D candidate,
              Color borderColor,
              Color backgroundColor)
        Paint the shape that will be created.
        Specified by:
        paintShape in class AbstractPolypointDecorationCreationMode
        lastPoint - is the last point in the path.
        candidate - is the next point that may be added in the path.
